political.s: Giant Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is a Taiwan-based bicycle manufacturer with no disclosed direct U.S. political contributions. The company does participate in industry advocacy through the Bicycling Alliance for Sustainability.

charity.s: Giant supports cycling advocacy and community programs including World Bicycle Relief, Bahati Foundation, Sprockids, and Trips for Kids. The company promotes accessible cycling infrastructure and injury prevention through partnerships.
charity.focus: Cycling advocacy, youth programs, community access, bicycle mobility

environment.s: Giant Group included in 2024 Dow Jones Sustainability Indices and reports carbon reduction achievements. The company develops recycled-material bikes and has set sustainability goals including energy transition and GHG inventory expansion.

labor.s: U.S. Customs and Border Protection issued a Withhold Release Order in September 2025 citing allegations of forced labor, debt bondage, abusive working conditions, wage withholding, and excessive overtime at Taiwan facilities. Giant has implemented reforms including recruitment fee elimination and dormitory improvements since early 2025.

dei.s: Giant Group reports over 1/3 of managers are female and emphasizes diversity hiring, female cycling brands (Liv), and inclusive initiatives. The company has integrated DEI into corporate governance and ESG strategy.

animals.s: Not applicable for bicycle manufacturing company.

guns.s: Not applicable for bicycle manufacturing company.

privacy.s: Giant collects personal data through websites and apps, uses third-party analytics and advertising cookies, and shares data with service providers. Company has privacy policies covering GDPR compliance and state privacy laws, though data sharing practices appear standard.

execPay.s: Not disclosed by company. Executive compensation data not publicly available in SEC filings (Taiwan-listed company).
